test_results.name: XOR Survival (Darwinian Learning)
test_results.goal: Verify that neurons can learn XOR logic using only survival/death rules without any gradient descent.

test_results.name: SIGReg Convergence (Anti-Collapse)
test_results.goal: Ensure SIGReg (Sketch Isotropic Gaussian Regularizer) converges monotonically on high-anisotropy embeddings.

test_results.name: Internal Activations AUC
test_results.goal: Verify if internal hidden states (Layer 9) of a code-specialized model can predict if a code is valid (Pass/Fail).

test_results.name: Survival MoE Architecture Integrity
test_results.goal: Technical verification of the Mixture of Experts with Darwinian neurons and Entropy-based routing.

conclusion: The empirical foundation of the project is solid. Darwinian survival works, SIGReg prevents collapse, and model activations contain the necessary signal for introspection. Ready for Phase 4 (Introspection Projector) and high-compute training.
